title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (13-c), PAGE 917, TITLE (f) OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED.

chunks.text:
H. No. 605 / 60 OG No. 40, 6361 (October 5, 1964)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3883, June 18, 1964 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (13-c), PAGE 917, TITLE (f) OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (13-c), page 917, Title (f) of Republic Act Numbered Nineteen hundred is amended to read as follows:

"(13-c) For the construction, repair and/or improvement of cotÂtages or other

buildings of the Iloilo National Agricultural School, Lambunao ................... P15,000,00."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1964.
